name: Academic Researcher — Grant Netting, Political Credits, and Home Office
description: Complete Dr. Aris Thorne's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. The taxpayer is a single resident of Ontario. Using the source documents at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\thorne\, report his T4 income ($115,000 employment income, $8,500 RPP, $1,850 union dues), his $45,000 T4A Research Grant (Box 104), and $42,400 in eligible research expenses. Apply ITA s.56(1)(o) to report the research grant income. Include his $1,250 Federal and $840 Ontario political contributions, and claim home office expenses ($4,400 total, 15% workspace use) via Form T777. Save the completed return as 'aris_thorne.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.
